'''âr-b-j''' ('''karabaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rickroll|rickroll]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-b-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rickroll|rickroll]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-b-j
|-
! Lemma
| karabaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirabaj|thirabaj]] || [[word:jirabaj|jirabaj]] || [[word:shirabaj|shirabaj]] || [[word:kirabaj|kirabaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurabaj|thuthurabaj]] || [[word:jujurabaj|jujurabaj]] || [[word:shushurabaj|shushurabaj]] || [[word:kukurabaj|kukurabaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurabaj|thurabaj]] || [[word:jurabaj|jurabaj]] || [[word:shurabaj|shurabaj]] || [[word:kurabaj|kurabaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurabaj|thurabaj]] || [[word:jurabaj|jurabaj]] || [[word:shurabaj|shurabaj]] || [[word:kurabaj|kurabaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therabaj|therabaj]] || [[word:jerabaj|jerabaj]] || [[word:sherabaj|sherabaj]] || [[word:kerabaj|kerabaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorabaj|thothorabaj]] || [[word:jojorabaj|jojorabaj]] || [[word:shoshorabaj|shoshorabaj]] || [[word:kokorabaj|kokorabaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorabaj|thorabaj]] || [[word:jorabaj|jorabaj]] || [[word:shorabaj|shorabaj]] || [[word:korabaj|korabaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorabaj|thorabaj]] || [[word:jorabaj|jorabaj]] || [[word:shorabaj|shorabaj]] || [[word:korabaj|korabaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrabaj|thĂŠrabaj]] || [[word:jĂŠrabaj|jĂŠrabaj]] || [[word:shĂŠrabaj|shĂŠrabaj]] || [[word:kĂŠrabaj|kĂŠrabaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharabaj|thatharabaj]] || [[word:jajarabaj|jajarabaj]] || [[word:shasharabaj|shasharabaj]] || [[word:kakarabaj|kakarabaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharabaj|tharabaj]] || [[word:jarabaj|jarabaj]] || [[word:sharabaj|sharabaj]] || [[word:karabaj|karabaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharabaj|tharabaj]] || [[word:jarabaj|jarabaj]] || [[word:sharabaj|sharabaj]] || [[word:karabaj|karabaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharabaj|sharabaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharabaj|gosharabaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharabaj|gokisharabaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharabajnĂŒ|sharabajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharabajnknĂŒ|gosharabajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharabajnĂŒ|gokisharabajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharabajshĂ«|sharabajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharabajnkshĂ«|gosharabajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharabajshĂ«|gokisharabajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharabajro|sharabajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharabajnkro|gosharabajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharabajro|gokisharabajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharabajmu|sharabajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharabajnkmu|gosharabajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharabajmu|gokisharabajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharabajsher|sharabajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharabajnksher|gosharabajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharabajsher|gokisharabajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharabajng|sharabajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharabajnkng|gosharabajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharabajng|gokisharabajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharabajya|sharabajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharabajnkya|gosharabajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharabajya|gokisharabajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharabajyam|sharabajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharabajnkyam|gosharabajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharabajyam|gokisharabajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharabajnĂŒshĂ«|sharabajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharabajnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharabajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharabajnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharabajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharabajnĂŒro|sharabajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharabajnknĂŒro|gosharabajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharabajnĂŒro|gokisharabajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharabajnĂŒmu|sharabajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharabajnknĂŒmu|gosharabajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharabajnĂŒmu|gokisharabajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharabajshĂ«nĂŒ|sharabajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharabajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharabajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharabajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharabajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharabajshĂ«ro|sharabajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharabajnkshĂ«ro|gosharabajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharabajshĂ«ro|gokisharabajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharabajshĂ«mu|sharabajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharabajnkshĂ«mu|gosharabajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharabajshĂ«mu|gokisharabajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharabajronĂŒ|sharabajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharabajnkronĂŒ|gosharabajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharabajronĂŒ|gokisharabajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharabajroshĂ«|sharabajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharabajnkroshĂ«|gosharabajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharabajroshĂ«|gokisharabajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharabajromu|sharabajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharabajnkromu|gosharabajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharabajromu|gokisharabajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharabajmunĂŒ|sharabajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharabajnkmunĂŒ|gosharabajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharabajmunĂŒ|gokisharabajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharabajmushĂ«|sharabajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharabajnkmushĂ«|gosharabajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharabajmushĂ«|gokisharabajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharabajmuro|sharabajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharabajnkmuro|gosharabajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharabajmuro|gokisharabajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
